examples: Her stockings were always laddered after work.
I broke a fingernail, laddered my tights and then missed my train - it seems it never rains but it pours.
It just wasn't my day: the car wouldn't start, I was late for the meeting, and to top it all I laddered my tights!
Think of it: if interest rates rise, the laddered arrangement will reinvest maturing bonds in the higher new rate, thus increasing your income overall.
